form_description: Project HIJRA-DOCUMENT REQUEST intake form. Captures a document request: the document being requested (PERMOHONAN DOKUMEN), the detailed document need (KEBUTUHAN DOKUMEN), and the user's superior (ATASAN USER).

fields.label: KEBUTUHAN DOKUMEN
fields.placeholder: We support markdown! Try **bold**, `inline code`, or ``` for code blocks.

manual_flags: ATASAN USER is a Jira user-picker (member-snapshot dropdown); n8n has no user-picker equivalent. Populate/refresh options as people join Plane, and map selection to a Plane assignee via the member map.
workflow_name: HDR · DOCUMENT REQUEST form → Plane work item
